title: Lava Chicken Disc
description: Lava Chicken Music Disc ported to lower version
body:
## Lava Chicken Music Disc

This is a mod that adds the music disc **Lava Chicken** originally added in 1.21.7-rc1 to lower versions.

Loot table is also added! You can kill a baby zombie riding a chicken to get this music disc.

**Currently supports Neoforge 1.21.1+ and Fabric 1.20.1+**

**This project has reached the end of its life.**
